title: Xalq Insurance Digital OS Video Edit Spec
description: The contract between the LLM (which plans the edit) and render.py (which executes it). The LLM never touches the video file; it only emits a document matching this schema. render.py reads it and runs FFmpeg + Remotion deterministically.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when the contract changes.

input.description: Path to the raw video, relative to video-studio/ (e.g. input/raw.mp4).

output.description: Path for the finished video, relative to video-studio/ (e.g. output/linkedin-clip.mp4).

platform.description: Target platform. Drives sensible defaults for aspect ratio and length.

title.description: Human label for this job, used in logs and filenames.

trim.description: Cut dead space off the head/tail of the raw video.

start.description: Trim-in timestamp, HH:MM:SS.mmm. null = from the very start.

end.description: Trim-out timestamp, HH:MM:SS.mmm. null = to the very end.

cuts.description: Inner ranges to delete (e.g. mistakes, long pauses). Applied after trim, before speed.

speed.description: Playback speed multiplier applied to the trimmed clip. 1.5 = 1.5x faster. Audio pitch is preserved.

aspect.description: Output aspect ratio. LinkedIn feed favours 1:1 or 4:5; reels/shorts use 9:16.

resolution.description: [width, height] in pixels. If omitted, derived from aspect (e.g. 9:16 -> [1080,1920]).

fit.description: cover = scale+crop to fill (no bars). contain = scale to fit, pad with a blurred backdrop.

normalize.description: Apply EBU R128 loudness normalisation to the voice track.

music.description: Background music bed. Tracks live in video-studio/music/ and are tagged in music/manifest.json.

track.description: "auto" = let the renderer pick from the manifest by mood, or an explicit path like music/energetic-01.mp3.

mood.description: Mood tag used when track is "auto". Must match a tag in music/manifest.json.

gain_db.description: Music level relative to 0 dB. Lower = quieter bed.

ducking.description: Automatically dip the music whenever the speaker is talking (sidechain compression).

language.description: Caption language. "en" transcribes (and translates if needed) to English via local Whisper.

style.description: karaoke = word-by-word highlight. block = one phrase at a time.

cta.description: Call to action, e.g. "Follow for more AI automation".

lower_thirds.description: Name/title cards that slide in over the video.

at.description: When to show it, HH:MM:SS in the FINAL timeline (after speed/intro).

line1.description: Primary line, e.g. a person's name.

accent_color.description: Hex accent used across all graphics.

logo.description: Path to a transparent PNG logo, or null.
